name: nyayasahayak-server
description: RAG-based legal case assistant for Allahabad HC domestic violence cases

scripts.rag:dev: for /f "tokens=1,* delims==" %A in ('findstr /B /C:"GEMINI_API_KEY=" .env') do set GEMINI_API_KEY=%B && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn rag_service.app:app --app-dir .. --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
